description:
Fix and Standardize Card Component Styling

Audit all card components throughout the application to identify and fix styling issues, then apply consistent visual design.

Requirements:
- Locate all card component instances across the codebase
- Identify cards with broken or inconsistent styling (layout issues, missing spacing, incorrect borders/shadows, etc.)
- Fix structural CSS/styling bugs preventing proper rendering
- Establish a unified card design system including:
  - Consistent padding and margins
  - Standardized border radius and shadow effects
  - Proper hover and focus states
  - Responsive behavior across screen sizes
- Apply the standardized styling to all card components
- Ensure visual hierarchy is clear (title, content, actions)
- Test rendering across different content lengths and viewport sizes
- Verify accessibility (contrast ratios, focus indicators)
